task: HTTP idempotency keys for mutating financial endpoints: idempotency_keys table + middleware (5 behaviors) + daily cleanup cron + frontend auto-key.

fields.note: Client sends Idempotency-Key: <uuid>; server stores key+response (24h TTL); replay returns cached response. Enforcement registered globally in index.ts main() only — route/integration test harnesses build minimal Fastify apps and are unaffected. Idempotency store reads/writes use withLuciaBypass (infra-level). RLS added on idempotency_keys for tenant-scope defense-in-depth + verify:rls-operating-company-scope compliance.
